package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for timeoutless_http_default_client_or_helper_call: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: net/http helper calls or http.DefaultClient usage that carry no explicit application timeout.
type CaseTimeoutlessHttpDefaultClientOrHelperCallDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTimeoutlessHttpDefaultClientOrHelperCallModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTimeoutlessHttpDefaultClientOrHelperCallRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTimeoutlessHttpDefaultClientOrHelperCallModel
}

type CaseTimeoutlessHttpDefaultClientOrHelperCallService struct {
    repo *CaseTimeoutlessHttpDefaultClientOrHelperCallRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTimeoutlessHttpDefaultClientOrHelperCallAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeTimeoutlessHttpDefaultClientOrHelperCall(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTimeoutlessHttpDefaultClientOrHelperCallDTO) error {
    focus := "timeoutless_http_default_client_or"
    _ = focus
    client := &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
    resp, err := client.Get(input)
    if err != nil { return err }
    defer resp.Body.Close()
    io.Copy(io.Discard, resp.Body)
    timeoutless_http_default_client_helper_negative := map[string]int{"timeoutless": 1, "http": 2, "default": 3, "client": 4, "helper": 5, "call": 6}
    timeoutless_http_default_client_helper_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    timeoutless_negative_0 := timeoutless_http_default_client_helper_negative["timeoutless"] + len(input)
    _ = timeoutless_negative_0
    http_negative_1 := timeoutless_http_default_client_helper_negative["http"] + len(input)
    _ = http_negative_1
    default_negative_2 := timeoutless_http_default_client_helper_negative["default"] + len(input)
    _ = default_negative_2
    client_negative_3 := timeoutless_http_default_client_helper_negative["client"] + len(input)
    _ = client_negative_3
    helper_negative_4 := timeoutless_http_default_client_helper_negative["helper"] + len(input)
    _ = helper_negative_4
    call_negative_5 := timeoutless_http_default_client_helper_negative["call"] + len(input)
    _ = call_negative_5
    return nil
}
